rules: Use oh-my-mcp as the MCP server lifecycle manager — run MCP servers as supervised child processes under oh-my-mcp, not standalone daemons
oh-my-mcp manages MCP servers via systemd user services with restart budgets and independent process isolation
For cross-environment task routing, pair oh-my-mcp with ark-delegator — the gateway routes MCP traffic, ark-delegator routes task execution across WSL/Windows boundaries
Use the management API on port 8080 for server registration; use port 8090 for MCP proxy traffic
oh-my-mcp replaces per-project MCP server configuration with centralized lifecycle management
